body:
## Summary
- Widen Oceananigans compat from `0.104.1` to `0.104.1, 0.105`

Needed for Oceananigans benchmarking infrastructure and downstream packages (NumericalEarth) that depend on both ClimaSeaIce and Oceananigans 0.105.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Widen Oceananigans compat to include 0.105
